main.subtitle: From film locations to travel courses, all in one place

login.heroDesc: Log in and discover personalized content
login.oauthRetry: On iOS, the first attempt may fail due to WKWebView policy. Please tap the same button again to retry. (It usually works on the second try.)
login.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter your email and password.
login.loginFailedCheck: Login failed: Please check your email or password.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.subtitle: Create an account to get started
signup.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your premium account
account.thankYou: Thank you for using Touraz Holic
account.deleteWarning: Deleting your account will permanently remove all data and cannot be undone.
account.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.

mypage.noNotificationsDesc: New DVD releases and movie recommendations will appear here
mypage.noLikedDesc: Tap the like button on movie details to add favorites!

support.headerDesc: If you need help or have questions about using {{appName}}, please use the form below.
support.contactDesc: Send us a message and we'll respond promptly
support.sendSuccess: Your message has been sent successfully!
support.sendFail: Failed to send. Please try again later.
support.faq1q: How do I delete my account?
support.faq1a: After logging in, click the 'Account' button on the dashboard to go to account settings. Type 'delete' and click the delete account button.
support.faq2q: What should I do if I encounter an error?
support.faq2a: Please let us know via the email below and we'll investigate. Including a screenshot will help us resolve it faster.
support.faq3q: How is my personal information handled?
support.faq3a: Touraz Holic protects your personal information securely. For detailed privacy inquiries, please email us.
support.faq4a: After logging in, tap the like/dislike/meh buttons on movie details to save your rating. Liked movies can be found in 'My Favorites'.
support.faq5a: You can find various recommendations on the dashboard. Check popular titles with 'Today's Movie/DVD' and 'Weekly/Monthly Rankings', and discover movies tailored to your taste with 'AI Recommendations' and 'Owner's Picks'.

dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, actor, or director...
dashboard.aiRecommendDesc: Describe the movie you want to watch. (e.g., a feel-good movie for a rainy day, romance for a date)
dashboard.aiRecommendPlaceholder: What kind of movie are you looking for?
dashboard.aiNoResults: No recommendations found. Try a different question.
dashboard.ownerDesc: Just tell us what you feel! Mood, situation, genre — anything goes. The owner will pick the perfect movie for you.
dashboard.ownerInputPlaceholder: e.g., something to fall asleep to, recommend anything, rainy day vibes...
dashboard.ownerLoading: The owner is browsing the store's hits...
dashboard.ownerResult: The owner picked these for you
dashboard.loginForRecommend: Log in to get personalized recommendations based on your likes!
dashboard.categoriesLoadError: Failed to load content. Check your network and try again.
dashboard.dvdListNetworkError: Unable to load DVD list. Please try again later.
dashboard.movieListNetworkError: Unable to load movie list. Please try again later.
dashboard.loginForRecommendDesc: Like movies to get personalized recommendations!
dashboard.batchUpdateDetail: DVDs update at 2 AM, movies at 3 AM daily
dashboard.musicCategoryBridgeLine: You watched it in the theater—when the music and concert scenes linger, the story continues on location: audio tours for your ears, CineTrip for real filming spots.

dvdStores.title: Find DVD Stores
dvdStores.subtitle: Nationwide DVD store info based on public data
dvdStores.pageSubtitle: Based on MOIS public data (video lounges & retail) · Auto-updated on the 1st of each month
dvdStores.locationUnavailable: Unable to determine location. Please allow browser location or check network.

photoGalleryPage.pageSubtitle: Scenic photos of Korea curated by the Korea Tourism Organization. Pick a region or search by keyword.
photoGalleryPage.emptyHint: Please try a different keyword, or check back again shortly.
photoGalleryPage.pageSubtitleSound: Pick a region, open a photo, and hear an Odii tourism audio clip matched to that area — like following a film location story with your ears.
photoGalleryPage.layerSoundNeedRegion: Choose a region chip or enter a search keyword to link Odii audio.
photoGalleryPage.gallerySoundHint: Opens Odii audio matched by region tokens inferred from your search.
photoGalleryPage.audioCuePrimary: “{{title}}” — tourism audio picked from Odii for your searched region.
photoGalleryPage.audioRegionalDisclaimer: The photo’s subject may still differ from this narration’s place. We widen Odii search using region tokens, then rank Odii items by overlap between photo title/location/keywords and Odii title/address/category (no RAG needed).
photoGalleryPage.audioEnded: This clip finished. Open another photo for another pick from the same regional pool.
photoGalleryPage.audioCueEmpty: No streamable audio matched this region right now.
photoGalleryPage.audioCueNeedRegion: Nationwide mode has no region keyword — tap a region chip first.

camping.pageSubtitle: Powered by Korea Tourism Organization's GoCamping database. After the movie, stay one more night under the stars in the forest.
camping.locationUnavailable: Could not detect your location. Please allow location access or check your network.
camping.emptyHint: Try a different region or keyword.
camping.errorHint: We couldn't load the list due to a network or service key issue.
camping.detailNotFoundHint: It may have been removed, or its data hasn't been loaded yet. Please go back to the list and try again.

nearbyCamping.title: Nearby Campsites
nearbyCamping.movieSection: After this movie · Stay one more night nearby
nearbyCamping.regionSection: In this region · A night in the forest
nearbyCamping.dvdNearbySection: Rent a DVD · Watch it at a nearby campsite

movieSpotlight.title: Following the trail of "{{movie}}"
movieSpotlight.subtitleHasMapping: Pick one of the buttons below to jump straight to places linked to this film.
movieSpotlight.subtitleNoMapping: Filming sites aren't mapped for this title yet. Browse the nationwide CineTrip curation instead.
movieSpotlight.viewSpots: See all places in this film

wellnessCalendar.title: Binge Recovery · Top 5 Quiet Healing Days
wellnessCalendar.subtitle: For viewers who finished the season. We pick days and regions with the lowest forecasted crowd over the next 2 weeks — book a hot spring, healing forest, or temple stay then to recover without crowds.
wellnessCalendar.source: Source: KTO tourist concentration forecast × Wellness curation
wellnessCalendar.cardTooltip: This filters the list below to only this district (map/data source code). Different from a page refresh (F5).
wellnessCalendar.filterCta: Filter healing spots to this district →

petCinema.headerTitle: Films to watch with your pet
petCinema.headerSubtitle: Continue the mood from your trip — film × travel in one flow

maum.blurb: A road movie about Jindo dog "Maum-i" and a brother & sister

sugar.subtitle: Korea · 2006
sugar.blurb: A girl's coming-of-age story with race horse Cheondoong

mari.subtitle: Korea anime · 2002
mari.blurb: Childhood memories with a white cat companion

hachi.subtitle: Hachi · 2009
hachi.blurb: The legendary Akita who waited for his owner

marley.subtitle: Marley & Me · 2008
marley.blurb: 12 years of family chaos with a Golden Retriever

isle.title: Isle of Dogs
isle.subtitle: Isle of Dogs · 2018
isle.blurb: An odd adventure of exiled dogs and a boy

travelWeather.noServerKey: Set KMA_API_KEY on the server to show KMA short-term forecasts.
travelWeather.upstreamHint: Complete the data portal / API Hub subscription, then set KMA_API_KEY (e.g. on Heroku).
travelWeather.received: Forecast received. For official values, see KMA releases.
travelWeather.outdoorCaution: Precipitation is possible — consider adjusting outdoor, trekking, or shooting plans.
travelWeather.indoorOk: Weather still sets the mood for indoor care, audio guides, and galleries.
travelWeather.navLocatingWeather: Getting location and weather. Allow location to use the nearest forecast grid.
travelWeather.panelRegionTabsHint: Each tab calls the KMA proxy again using that city's representative coordinates (ultra-short + short-term).
travelWeather.panelRegionError: Couldn't load this area. Tap the tab again later.
travelWeather.panelDisclaimer: Values follow KMA/API responses. For safety, always check official forecasts.
travelWeather.forecastHourlyVsrtHint: Ultra-short grid. Short-term SKY/POP is merged when times align.
travelWeather.forecastStepHint: Short-term reg forecast (~3 h steps): SKY, POP, etc.
travelWeather.ariaDry: No nearby precipitation in the forecast. For outdoor planning only.
travelWeather.ariaRainMaybe: Precipitation possible. Check official hourly data.
travelWeather.ariaDryNeutral: No notable precipitation in the forecast.

nearbyCineTrip.errorLoad: Couldn't load CineTrip curation for this region
nearbyCineTrip.empty: No film curations are linked to this region yet.

trendingRegions.heading: Trending
trendingRegions.periodScoreHint: Period-weighted score used for this tab’s ranking
trendingRegions.searchVolumeHint: Tourism search-interest index from KTO data — not visitor headcount.

cineTrip.title: Cinematic Journeys
cineTrip.desc: Check in with curated cards alive with filming sites, backdrops, and OSTs.

petTravel.title: Travel with your pet
petTravel.desc: Sunshine and four paws — discover pet-friendly places mapped out for you.

trekking.title: Walking journeys across Korea
trekking.desc: 284 Korea Trail courses through forests, coasts, and villages — fresh strolls await.

photoGallery.title: Tourism Photo Gallery
photoGallery.desc: Browse a KTO-curated nationwide scenery album by region.

camping.title: Find a campsite anywhere in Korea
camping.desc: After tonight's film, stay one more night at a forest campsite under the stars — campsites near you in one click.

wellness.title: Post-binge healing spots
wellness.desc: After the marathon, reset sore shoulders and a tired mind at nearby hot springs, spas, and healing forests.

medicalTourism.title: K-Medical Tourism · Foreigners Welcome
medicalTourism.desc: Plastic surgery, traditional Korean medicine, health checkups, rehab, beauty, spine, and dental — verified Korean medical spots for international travelers, in both EN and KO.

audioGuide.tag: Cine Audio Trail · Odii · Backdrops by ear
audioGuide.title: Watch in theaters · Hear stories on location
audioGuide.desc: Rest your eyes after a binge — listen instead. Four KTO Audio Guide signature courses: filming sites, DVD return route, palaces, and temples — hidden tales in your earbuds.

crowdRadar.title: We'll whisper which filming sites are calm
crowdRadar.desc: Films may be loud, but visit the locations when they're quiet. KTO × KT big-data 30-day concentration forecasts help you find uncrowded days at filming sites.

relatedSpots.tag: Korea Tour Big Data · Where visitors went next
relatedSpots.title: Beside the quiet spot, where did people drift next?
relatedSpots.desc: Think of one place — KTO TarRlteTarService1 quietly traces where its visitors wandered next.

petTravel.heroTitle: Sunshine, paws, and wide open roads
petTravel.heroSubtitle1: If you've been cooped up indoors, it's time to feel the spring breeze on four paws.
petTravel.heroSubtitle2: Pet-friendly spots in each region, plus films tied to that area, Photo Korea contest winners, the tourism photo gallery, and Durunubi trails — woven together on one screen.
petTravel.bannerTitle: Ready for a breath of fresh air?
petTravel.bannerBody: Pick pet-friendly places below, then follow film curation, Photo Korea winners, the tourism photo gallery, and trails — in order. Source: Korea Tourism Organization.
petTravel.cinemaTitle: Films set in {{region}} — perfect to revisit with your pet
petTravel.cinemaComboTitle: Films set in {{region}} · curated with travel in mind
petTravel.walkTitle: Trails great for a walk with your pet
petTravel.dataSource: Data · KorPetTour, Photo Korea winners (PhokoAwrd), Tourism Photo Gallery (PhotoGalleryService1), Korea Trails (Durunubi), film-linked curation

trekking.heroBody: Follow 284 KTO-curated Korea Trails (Durunubi) — GPX tracks, regions, and nearby attractions — connecting filming-location tours and pet-friendly trips into a fresh walking experience.
trekking.curatedSectionSub: Curated city walls, perimeter trails, riverside paths
trekking.coursesEmptyCoastalNote: Korea Trails (Haeparang/Nampaarang/Seohaerang) follow the coastline and don't pass through {{region}}. Check the "Recommended walking trails in {{region}}" section above for popular local walks.
trekking.coursesEmptyArea: Durunubi has no Korea Trail courses passing through {{region}}.
trekking.coursesEmpty: No courses match the current filter yet

relatedSpots.heroBadge: KTO Big Data · Where Visitors Went Next
relatedSpots.heroTitle:
Beside the quiet spot,
where did people drift next?
relatedSpots.heroSubtitle:
Think of one place. Data quietly traces
the nearby spots its visitors wandered to next.
relatedSpots.searchPlaceholder: Try a city/region or landmark (e.g. Yeosu · Hallasan · Gyeongju)
relatedSpots.errorGeneric: Couldn't load data. Please try again in a moment.
relatedSpots.summary: Found {{relatedCount}} companion places across {{groupCount}} base spots
relatedSpots.groupCopy: Places visitors of this spot went to together or next. Tap one to gently unfold details.

modal.rankRelation:
Visitors of {{baseSpot}}{{baseRegionPart}}
went here as their #{{rank}} next stop.
modal.togetherRelation:
Visitors of {{baseSpot}}{{baseRegionPart}}
went here together with that spot.
modal.noBaseRelation: Where people went next from this spot.
modal.deeperHintWithBrief:
Hours, reservations and more — continue gently
through external maps or search.
modal.deeperHint:
Coordinates, photos, hours — continue gently
through external maps or search.

relatedSpots.emptyHint:
Type a place you have in mind,
or pick a popular region below.

noResult.noData: The data here is still quiet.

KTO big data is grouped at the city/district level.
Pick a nearby popular region below to gently see places visited together.
noResult.fallback: Try other paths in Cinematic Journeys

wellness.pageTitle: Post-Binge Recovery · Healing Spots Near You
wellness.pageSubtitle: After a long movie/drama marathon, unwind your sore shoulders and tired mind at KTO-curated wellness spots — hot springs, spas, healing forests, temple stays, meditation and yoga studios nationwide.

audioGuide.pageTitle: Cine Audio Trail · KTO Audio Guide

hero.title: Films in theaters · Stories on location by ear
hero.sub: Rest your eyes and travel with your ears. Listen to site narration and hidden tales on location with KTO's audio guide.
hero.odiiDataAria: KTO Odii API language for scripts and search

search.placeholder: Search spots, stories, keywords (e.g. Gyeongbokgung, folk, K-Drama)

nearby.denied: Location permission denied. Please enable it in browser settings.
nearby.unsupported: This browser does not support geolocation.

meta.noKeyBody: The server has no KTO Odii API key set. Add ODII_API_KEY (or VISITKOREA_SERVICE_KEY) in your Heroku config.
meta.emptyBody: A key appears to be set, but Odii still returns no items. Check data.go.kr: Odii subscription approval and daily per-operation call limits.

audioGuide.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No audio guides match your filter
empty.sub: Try another keyword, theme, or region.

detail.noAudio: No audio file provided for this item.
detail.audioErr: Unable to play audio. Try opening the original file.

themeIntro.title: Overview narration
themeIntro.sub: Below are shorter narration clips for the same place.

detail.directionsLocating: Fetching your location to fill the starting point…
detail.directionsDeniedHint: Without location permission, set the starting point in the map app.

tts.title: Listen with AI voice
tts.sub: The Odii public API does not expose audio files. We read the narration script aloud using your browser's speech synthesis.
tts.note: Voice quality depends on your browser/OS.
tts.voiceStackHint: The highlighted row is what playback uses. If you pick a voice in the English row, Korean scripts are read with that English voice too. Choose the Korean row again to use Korean voices.

stories.title: Narration stories for this spot
stories.sub: Odii does not expose audio files. Pick a related narration story and listen with AI voice.
stories.empty: No narration stories linked to this spot yet. The server cache may still be warming up — please try again in a moment.

courses.aria: Four signature Cine Audio Trail courses
courses.title: Cine Audio Trail · 4 Signature Courses

film.title: Filming Sites · Cine Set Trail
film.desc: That scene from the movie, that very place. Hear on location why the director chose this backdrop.

dvd.title: DVD Return Route
dvd.desc: On the way to return your DVD, listen to hidden narrations around your current location. GPS-based audio guide.

palace.title: Royal Palaces · Whisper
palace.desc: Royal stories beyond the walls of Gyeongbok, Changdeok, and Deoksu palaces. A day in Joseon you can walk and listen.

temple.title: Temples · Mindful Path
temple.desc: Bulguksa, Haeinsa, Tongdosa… a meditative audio trail tracing monks' footsteps.

toast.noaudio: Many items have no audio. Tap a specific card to play it directly.

crowdRadar.title: Quiet Set Radar
crowdRadar.subtitle: Films were noisy. Their sets don't have to be. Based on Korea Tourism Organization x KT mobility big data, preview the next-30-day concentration forecast for Korean tourist spots and plan your cine-trip on a quiet day.
crowdRadar.empty: No forecast data matches your filters.
crowdRadar.credit: Data: Korea Tourism Organization · KT mobility big data concentration forecast (data.go.kr 15128555)

help.summary: Numbers are tourist-spot concentration on a 0–100% scale — lower means quieter
